items.title: Test Modify Flow
items.revised_instructions: Limit changes to routing docs only. Do not change approval rules.

body.summary: Use this section to describe the proposed action in a sentence.
body.full_context: Capture the background, constraints, and any prior work that led to this request.
body.proposed_action: Spell out what should happen next and how it affects the system.
body.why_this_was_triggered: Explain the decision or observation that caused the assistant to open this review.
body.risk_assessment: Justify whether the request is low, medium, or high risk.
body.suggested_route: Recommend Local, Claude, or Codex along with why that route is right.
body.affected_components: List files, systems, or workflows that will be touched.
body.operator_notes: Leave space for the operator to jot questions, comments, or decisions.
body.revised_instructions: Use this if the operator asks for changes before approval.
body.final_outcome:
Record the result after the action completes.
This entry is for testing the Modify decision path.
